_comment: The badge catalog. Loaded by `flask seed-badges` (see app/cli.py). `code` is the natural key BadgeService (app/badges.py) awards against — rename with care, since existing UserBadge rows reference badges by id, not code, but new awards look badges up by code.

badges.code: string, unique — matched by BadgeService's rule names
badges.name: string — display name
badges.icon: string — a single emoji shown next to the name
badges.description: string — how the badge is earned

badges.name: First Concert
badges.description: Marked attendance at your first concert.

badges.name: World Traveler
badges.description: Attended a concert outside your home country.
